shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-datepicker withPortal portalId extra wrapper input-container React portal" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short && git diff --check && git diff --stat && mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-datepicker-portal-sibling-render.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Preserve direct input-container hierarchy with portals

When a React component renders a local input container alongside separately portaled content, group the siblings with a fragment instead of a DOM wrapper. The portal still controls where the calendar is mounted, while the fragment preserves the caller-visible DOM hierarchy and avoids introducing an unstyled layout element.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'
